name: get_portfolio_summary
description: Retrieves a summary of an investment portfolio, including performance metrics and asset allocation.

portfolio_id.$comment: Opaque string ID linked to user account.

as_of_date.description: Optional date (ISO 8601 format) to retrieve the summary for. Defaults to current date.

include_performance.description: Whether to calculate and return historical performance metrics.
include_performance.$comment: Set to false to reduce computation if only allocation is needed.

include_allocation.description: Whether to return asset allocation percentages by asset class or ticker.
include_allocation.$comment: Set to false to omit asset-by-asset weights.

currency.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code to display values.
